heading: Tonight
text: Mostly clear. Areas of river valley fog developing.Lows around 50, mid 50s around Burlington. Winds light and variable, becoming south near 10 mph through the Champlain Valley.

heading: Tuesday
text: Areas of valley fog burning off to sunshine. Feathery high clouds will move in from the northwest in the afternoon. Warmer. Highs in the low to mid 80s, a few upper 70s across the higher elevations north, near 90 in the valleys south. Winds light, varying from south to west up to 10 mph.

heading: Tuesday Night
text: Mainly clear early, then clouds building from the west becoming partly cloudy and milder. Lows in the 50s to low 60s. Winds light and variable, becoming south near 10 mph in the Champlain and St. Lawrence valleys.
